---
title: "Three Wild Bears (13% Gravel)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="32.49" data-elevation="3321.19" data-time="203" data-has-gravel="true">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>32.49</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3321.19 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:23</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.18 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#1a9850;">89%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>21.99</td>
      <td>68.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>3.27</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>3.10</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.44</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.52</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.18</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,138</td>
      <td>7.3</td>
      <td>70 ± 34</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Castro Ranch Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>50</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Castro Ranch Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Alhambra Valley Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>64</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Bear Creek Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>39</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Bear Creek Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>65</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>234</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>185</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>64</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Bear Creek Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>174</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>6 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>59</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11. Bear Creek Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>110</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>314</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>9 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>113</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>40</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>79</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>50</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>17. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>99</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>18. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>73</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>19. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>135</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>20. Solano Avenue: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>71</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,138</td>
      <td>32.6</td>
      <td>203 ± 72</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>6.6</td>
      <td>35</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Castro Ranch Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>50</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Castro Ranch Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>3.6</td>
      <td>19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Alhambra Valley Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>64</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Bear Creek Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>39</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Bear Creek Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>65</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>234</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>6 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>185</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>64</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Bear Creek Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>174</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>6 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10. Bear Creek Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>59</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11. Bear Creek Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>110</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.1</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>314</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>9 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>113</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>40</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>79</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>50</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>17. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>99</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>18. Wildcat Canyon Road: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>73</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>27</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>19. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>135</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.5</td>
      <td>7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>20. Solano Avenue: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>71</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>2 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>7</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three-bears-gravel-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>12.5</td>
      <td>38.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>5.6</td>
      <td>17.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>16.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>4.3</td>
      <td>13.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>6.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>3.7</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
